overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a Western saloon interior, featuring patrons seated at wooden tables under warm light filtering through stained glass windows. The static camera captures the ambient atmosphere and subtle character animations typical of high-end open-world games.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a Western saloon interior with warm light filtering through stained glass windows on the left. Patrons sit at wooden tables engaged in quiet conversation and drinking. Around the 12-second mark, a new patron enters from the right and joins the table on the right side, increasing the occupancy from two to three people.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static, atmospheric view of a Western saloon interior that shifts from a quiet gathering to a more crowded social space. It begins with warm light filtering through stained glass windows on the left, illuminating patrons seated at wooden tables engaged in quiet conversation and drinking. As the scene unfolds, the stillness of the room is interrupted when a new patron enters from the right. The camera remains steady as this individual joins a table on the right side, increasing the occupancy from two to three people. The shot concludes with the group now fully assembled, deepening the lived-in feel of the ambient environment.
